dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your social media activity
dashboard.noPosts: No posts yet. Create your first post!
dashboard.emptyDescription: Published posts, schedules, and drafts will show up here so you can track everything at a glance.

posts.title: Posts
posts.description: Manage all your social media posts
posts.emptyDescription: Once you create content, this list will show drafts, scheduled posts, published posts, and failures.

newPost.title: New Post
newPost.description: Create and publish to your connected platforms
newPost.schedulePast: Scheduled time is in the past
newPost.dropzoneTitle: Drop files here or click to upload
newPost.dropzoneDescription: Supports images plus MP4 and WebM video
newPost.limitExceededTooltip: Content exceeds the character limit for {platform}

editPost.title: Edit Post
editPost.schedulePast: Scheduled time is in the past

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.emptyDescription: Start writing something now and come back later when you are ready to publish.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.emptyDay: No posts scheduled for this day
calendar.emptyMonth: There is nothing scheduled for this month yet.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.emptyDescription: Connect accounts and publish posts first so the app can start pulling engagement and impression data.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Manage connected accounts and configure each platform credential first
accounts.discordInfo: Discord uses a Bot Token and Webhook URL. Add them on the Credentials page first.
accounts.discordGuideDesc: Save the Discord Bot Token and Webhook URL on the Credentials page first, then come back to connect in one click.
accounts.disconnectBlocked: Disconnect blocked: {count} posts still use this account
accounts.credentialsReady: Credentials are ready. You can connect now.
accounts.credentialsRequired: {platform} credentials are missing. Add them in Credentials first.
accounts.emptyDescription: Connect at least one platform account first. You will then see auth health and publishing readiness here.
accounts.credentialsNeededDesc: {platform} needs developer credentials before you can connect the account.
accounts.disconnectTooltip: Cannot disconnect: {count} posts use this account. Delete or reassign them first.

credentials.title: Platform credentials
credentials.description: After users obtain developer credentials from each platform, they can paste them here directly with no .env editing. Account connection, token refresh, and publishing will use these saved credentials first.
credentials.notConfigured: This platform is not configured yet

help.linkedin: Create an app in LinkedIn Developer, then paste the Client ID and Client Secret here.
help.twitter: Create an app in the X Developer Portal, then paste the API Key and API Secret here.
help.facebook: Create an app in Meta for Developers and enable Facebook Login, then fill in the App ID and App Secret.
help.discord: Create a Discord Bot and Webhook, then paste the Bot Token and Webhook URL here.
help.reddit: Create an app in Reddit Apps, then fill in the Client ID and Client Secret here.
help.youtube: Create an OAuth Client in Google Cloud Console, then paste the Client ID and Client Secret here.

credentials.sourceEnvironmentTooltip: These credentials are set in the server environment variables.

portalHelp.youtube: Enable YouTube Data API at console.cloud.google.com
